case_title: VICTOR VIDAL GARCIA SARAT VS. HEVERT VARGAS

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF SARAT, VICTOR VIDAL GARCIA AS TO DEFENDANT VARGAS, HEVERT AN INDIVIDUAL JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

NOTICE OF MOTION TO COMPEL ANSWERS TO POST-JUDGMENT DISCOVERY; AND FOR AWARD OF MONETARY SANCTIONS, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF SARAT, VICTOR VIDAL GARCIA HEARING SET FOR JUL-23-2007 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 610

DISCOVERY 610, PLAINTIFF VICTOR SARAT'S MOTION TO COMPEL RESPONSES TO POST JUDGMENT INTERROGATORIES AND REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS IS GRANTED. MONETARY SANCTIONS IN THE AMOUNT OF $340 ARE TO BE PAID WITHIN 21 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN.

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion To Compel Answers To Post-Judgment Discovery; And For Award Of Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Jul-23-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff Victor Sarat's motion to compel responses to post judgment interrogatories and request for production of documents is granted. No opposition has been filed. Defendant is ordered to serve complete verified responses without objection and produce documents within 21 days of notice of this order. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $340 are to be paid within 21 days of notice of this order. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN.
